intent: Style the calculator to look polished and usable in a browser. The CSS should cover the display, button grid, history panel, and hover/active states. No external CSS frameworks.
acceptance_checks: Calculator is centered on the page and looks intentional on a typical laptop screen (>=1280px wide)
Buttons have visible hover and active states (color change, shadow, or scale)
Display area has clear visual separation from the button grid
History panel is visually distinct and scrollable if content overflows
No horizontal scrollbar at any viewport >=1024px wide
